title: thelypteris normalis var. harperi
intro: Thelypteris normalis var. harperi, also known as the Harper's maiden fern, is a species of fern native to the southeastern United States. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which aid in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Thelypteris normalis var. harperi include reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing irritated throats, making it a valuable natural remedy for respiratory health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used topically to treat skin irritations and wounds.
